title: Merch Trying to find out if this is legit
display_title: Merch Trying to find out if this is legit
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Trying to find out if this is legit.             Quote Post by lincolne » Sun Mar 16, 2014 3:07 pm I had gotten this last year. But i do not know if it is a Official Evangelion item. It is a Evangelion Pin set in a picture frame. Has anyone see this before?

[]:             Quote Post by lastcody » Sun Mar 16, 2014 8:00 pm The logo I know is from eva pachinko but I'm not sure if they are official pins but they might be.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Mar 16, 2014 8:15 pm Yep. As far as I can tell, it looks like a legit pachinko pin set.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Mar 16, 2014 8:43 pm Any identifying info like manufacturer, product code, licensing stickers?

[]:             Quote Post by lincolne » Tue Mar 18, 2014 9:05 am First off Thanks for the replies. Looking at the original Box there is no official sticker. But it does have the brand Bisty (I know them for the Evangelion Pachislo machine I own). The box also has the Brand Fields and Project 4s..

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Mar 18, 2014 11:10 pm Another thing you will typically see is mention of the copyright holder, khara nowadays and previously Gainax.
